title: Organic synthesis
summary: 9701 A Level — multi-step routes, retrosynthesis, and reagent selection.
learningObjectives: Select reagents for functional group interconversion.
Justify choice of conditions and order of steps.

simpleExplanation.title: Building the target molecule
simpleExplanation.summary: A Level synthesis questions give a target and ask for a route from a stated starting material using syllabus reactions only.
steps: List reagents for each forward step.

sections.content: **Organic synthesis** (36.1) integrates **Topics 14–35**. Examiners award marks for **correct reagents and conditions** at each step.
